'''Meg Pitareeze''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]], the wife of [[Jarth Pitareeze|Jarth]] and mother of [[Nak Pitareeze|Nak]]. She owned and operated [[Kalarba Safari]] alongside the rest of the [[Pitareeze family]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] came to work for the family at the factory after escaping from [[IG-88B|IG-88's]] stolen ship via an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]].
